About the Listing

This exclusive listing is presented by Daniel Issak of Real Estate Source, Inc., specializing in luxury residential leasing in the greater Los Angeles market.

9432 Oakmore Rd is offered as an exclusive right listing. Showings are by appointment only with a minimum 24-hour notice. The listing agent must accompany all showings.

Application Requirements

  • CAR rental application
  • Full credit report (tenant pays $49.99)
  • Proof of income / funds
  • Supporting documents — submit as single PDF
  • Only complete applications reviewed
Schedule a Showing →

Broker/Agent does not guarantee the accuracy of square footage, lot size, or other information concerning the conditions or features of the property provided by the seller or obtained from public records or other sources. Tenant is advised to independently verify all information through personal inspection and with appropriate professionals.
